next_step: Schedule site visit for Thursday at 5:30 PM. Priya confirmed this slot. Assign design lead from Bengaluru South team.
project_overview: 3BHK apartment in Whitefield, Bengaluru (1450 sqft) requiring full-home contemporary interior design with warm tones and functional storage. Budget of ₹18–22 lakh, targeting completion by July 2026.
client_requirements: Client prefers a contemporary style with warm beige and sage green tones. Must-haves: large kitchen storage, child-safe rounded furniture edges, a dedicated pooja room with teak finish. Avoid: dark accent walls, open shelving in kitchen, glossy flooring.
timeline: Design to begin April 2026, execution by July 2026 (3 months)
special_considerations: Child-safe design required (2 children, ages 4 and 7); high storage priority across all rooms; Vastu: flexible orientation for pooja room preferred; no pets.
design_direction: A warm contemporary sanctuary where clean lines meet earthy textures — think travertine tiles, teak wood panelling, and sage upholstery that creates a home that breathes calm without feeling cold.
execution_readiness: Client has possession confirmed from April 1st; builder handover is complete. Budget is allocated and design scope is well-defined — execution can begin immediately after site visit.
